label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation as it appears on the records of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Domestic nonprofit corporation name as it appears on the SOS record. Must match record exactly so SOS can identify the entity whose registered-agent slot is being vacated.

label_verbatim: FIRST: (name of current noncommercial registered agent)
rationale: Name of the noncommercial registered agent of record (i.e., the resigning party / filer). Reuses the registered_agent.name namespace per the NCRA-family precedent (MBCA-3A-NCRA / MBCA-12E-NCRA / MLLC-3A-NCRA). Drafter initially proposed resigning_agent.name; corrected during review.

label_verbatim: (physical street address, city, state and zip code – as it appears on the record)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the noncommercial registered agent of record. Form explicitly says 'as it appears on the record' — the value must match the SOS record verbatim, not the agent's current preferred address.

label_verbatim: SECOND: (insert name) — corporate officer to receive notice
rationale: Name of the natural person at the corporation to whom the agent will deliver the §111-required notice of resignation (mandatory predicate for the resignation to take effect 31 days later). Reuses the NCRA-family resignation_notice.* namespace. Drafter initially proposed notice_recipient.name; corrected during review.

label_verbatim: (mailing address including zip code) — for §111 notice
rationale: Mailing address (single line incl. ZIP) where the §111 notice of resignation will be sent. Drafter initially proposed notice_recipient.mailing_address; corrected to NCRA-family resignation_notice.recipient_address.
Title of the corporate officer receiving the §111 notice (e.g., 'President', 'Secretary', 'Clerk'). Form caption restricts the recipient to a corporate-officer title.
Date the statement of resignation is signed; resignation takes effect 31 days after this filing is delivered to the corporation.

label_verbatim: (type or print name) — below the (signature of noncommercial registered agent) caption
rationale: Signer printed name. Single widget, no separate title field on this form; matches Shape B of filing-signer-shape (name only) per NCRA-family precedent. Signer is by definition the resigning noncommercial registered agent whose name was already entered at Text2; redundant by design (form acts as both attestation and signature).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees (page-0 header references base fee plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (applies to the corporation; resignation does not affect annual-report obligations — only the registered-agent slot).
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
